styles.css.name: /* repeat patch: darker tiles + stronger hero tint */ .tile
/* latest tweak: darker tiles + single tree color */ .tile
/* latest fix: remove selected title spacing and stop page jump */ .right-panel
/* request pass: darker tiles, bigger enemies, distinct ability visuals */ .tile
/* status overlay stacked below the battlefield */ .center-panel
/* tweak pass: easy/challenge labels, obstacle darkness retained */ .tile.player-obstacle, .tile.random-obstacle
/* Responsive breakpoints 360px : mobile 568px : small landscape 666px : large landscape 768px : tablet 1024px : large tablet / small laptop 1300px : full de...
/* === Bar swap: health fully inside black area above activity === */ .hp-bar, .cooldown-bar
/* Health bar sits clearly inside black strip */ .hp-bar
/* Hero header text inside colored strip */ /* Level tucked directly under class text */ /* Left-aligned header text inside colored strip */ /* Level left-al...
/* Lv left aligned and lowered */ /* Level number only, larger */ .tile-small
/* Keep hero panel visible as viewport narrows */ @media (min-width: 901px) and (max-width: 1420px)
/* Keep hero info visible before it drops */ @media (min-width: 901px) and (max-width: 1760px)
/* Final desktop layout: right panel always outside board, run log collapses cleanly */ .runlog-header
/* Narrow desktop: shrink board tile size first before letting the right panel overlap */ @media (min-width: 901px) and (max-width: 1760px)
/* === FINAL DESKTOP BOARD SAFETY LAYOUT OVERRIDES === */ .runlog-header
/* Keep hero panel outside the board by shrinking board first */ @media (min-width: 901px) and (max-width: 1760px)
/* 2026 mobile landscape rebuild: iPhone 14 Pro first */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: portrait)
/* iPhone 14 Pro Max landscape tune: keep full board visible and restore full-width ability dock */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* Final mobile landscape board-fit correction: force full 14x6 board on screen */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v8: runtime-sized mobile board fit for iPhone 14 Pro Max landscape */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v10: final mobile landscape fit + overlay message cleanup */ .tile, .grid > .tile
/* v11: final mobile message overlay + edge-safe board fit */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v13: mobile transient banner as true overlay; no board reservation */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v15 precise mobile bottom bar + message fixes */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v17 force fully opaque mobile status overlay */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v18: truly solid mobile status overlay */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v19: desktop board fill tune — expand board and keep right hero/hire info column visually matched */ @media (min-width: 1025px)
/* v24.2: desktop bottom HUD split into two clean rows; keep mobile unchanged */ @media (min-width: 1025px)
/* v24.5: desktop status/info message floats near bottom center and lasts 2.5s */ @media (min-width: 1025px)
/* v24.8: challenge mode visible but unavailable */ .coming-soon-toggle, #mobileFuncChallengeBtn:disabled
/* v46.9.1.60: keep the selected info box height fixed, but give the desktop info panel 50% more vertical room so all action buttons stay visible */ @media (...
/* v46.9.1.27 desktop width restore + announcement modal */ @media (min-width: 1025px)
/* v46.9.1.60 user fix: taller desktop info panel, dark summoner foot-cloud, smaller boss, smaller skitter explosion */ .boss-storm-cloud
/* DFK Gold swap + relic modal layout hardening */ .relic-modal-card
/* v46.9.1.53 mobile HUD + intro + relic fit fixes */ #storyText.big-final, .story-text.big-final
/* v7 mobile-only hero tile + max level button refinements */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v8.1 mobile-only intro/relic fit cleanup */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v12 mobile-only iPhone 12 fit + hero tile text cleanup */ @media (max-width: 900px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v16 mobile-only fix: render hero art as the actual button background instead of Safari-fragile pseudo layers */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientatio...
/* v21 mobile-only cleanup: restore board backdrop, remove button backgrounds, tighten dock height */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v22 mobile tint + satellite readiness cue */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v26 mobile ability width + clearer locked/cooldown states */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v27 mobile spacing tune: pull left quick rail closer to board and tighten ability dock */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (min-width: 901px) and (orientati...
/* v29 revert ability dock width, lock dock to board edges, and let board expand to available right-side space */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation...
/* v31: force mobile ability buttons under the board and keep all 4 visible */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* v32 mobile landscape hard reset: ability dock spans under board area, not the left rail */ @media (max-width: 1024px) and (orientation: landscape)
/* =================================================================== FLUID BOARD: panels shrink as viewport narrows so the game board always fits horizonta...
/* 1025–1160 px: board needs ~745px, panels at 175px, gap tightens */ @media (min-width: 1025px) and (max-width: 1160px)
/* 1025–1080 px: panels at 148/152px, gap tightens to 4px */ @media (min-width: 1025px) and (max-width: 1080px)
/* 1025–1030 px: tightest desktop, panels at 128/132px */ @media (min-width: 1025px) and (max-width: 1030px)
/* Withdrawal tabs and smaller request cards */ .reward-claims-tabs
/* V10.2.8 daily quest modal layout refresh */ .bounty-modal-card
/* V10.3.0 force wider dailies / bounties modal */ body #questsModal.intro-modal, body #bountyModal.intro-modal
/* v46.9.1.146 tap responsiveness + quest modal scroll hardening */ body.intro-open
/* v46.9.1.158: Wallet Heroes opens as a modal, while the left menu only shows the summary button. */ body.wallet-heroes-modal-open::after
/* v46.9.1.158: repair Wallet Heroes modal layering and How to Play click ownership. */ #walletHeroBonusSection.wallet-hero-panel.modal-open
/* v46.9.1.161: show Gen0 buff details in the selected hero info panel. */ .selected-info-gen0-buff
/* v46.9.1.163: visual Gen0 active run banner. */ .gen0-active-banner
/* v46.9.1.163: move Gen0 active status into the Wallet Heroes menu button. */ .wallet-hero-panel-toggle
/* v46.9.1.173: restored How to Play with simple modal-owned focus. No wheel/touch rerouting. */ #seerIntroModal.how-to-play-active:not(.hidden)
/* Compact daily rewards header: keep the accessible title hidden, show only the kicker. */ .sr-only
/* v46.9.1.183: show Blinding Light Totem waves remaining on its tile */ .tile-totem-waves-badge
/* v46.9.1.206: targeted desktop bottom HUD/hire layout tweaks */ #skipSetupBtn
/* v46.9.1.209: GEN0 hire note above button + restored start-wave-hint sizing */ .start-wave-hint
